'''chabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xerographically|xerographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xerographically|xerographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chabate|chabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chabatesher|chabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chabatesherĂ«m|chabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chabatero|chabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chabateshĂ«|chabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chabateshĂ«m|chabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichabatero|gokichabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichabateshĂ«|gokichabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichabateshĂ«m|gokichabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochabankerom|gochabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochabankeshĂ«|gochabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochabankeshĂ«m|gochabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochabankeya|gochabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chabaterom|chabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chabatemu|chabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chabateya|chabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichabaterom|gokichabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichabatemu|gokichabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichabateya|gokichabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chababate|chababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chababatesher|chababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chababatesherĂ«m|chababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chababatero|chababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chababateshĂ«|chababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chababateshĂ«m|chababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichababatero|gokichababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichababateshĂ«|gokichababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichababateshĂ«m|gokichababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochababankerom|gochababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochababankeshĂ«|gochababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochababankeshĂ«m|gochababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochababankeya|gochababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chababaterom|chababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chababatemu|chababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chababateya|chababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichababaterom|gokichababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichababatemu|gokichababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichababateya|gokichababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠte|chĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠtesher|chĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠtero|chĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠbĂŠtero|gokichĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠterom|chĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠtemu|chĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠbĂŠteya|chĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠbĂŠterom|gokichĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠbĂŠteya|gokichĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafbafte|chafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafbaftesher|chafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafbaftesherĂ«m|chafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafbaftero|chafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafbafteshĂ«|chafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafbafteshĂ«m|chafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafbaftero|gokichafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafbafteshĂ«|gokichafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafbafteshĂ«m|gokichafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafbafnkerom|gochafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafbafnkeshĂ«|gochafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafbafnkeshĂ«m|gochafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafbafnkeya|gochafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafbafterom|chafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafbaftemu|chafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafbafteya|chafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafbafterom|gokichafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafbaftemu|gokichafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafbafteya|gokichafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
